title: Sneaker
description: Makes you crouch at the edge of the block, preventing falling and improving speed-bridge timing. (Toggleable)
body:
Automatically keeps you crouched when you reach the edge of a block, helping you maintain rhythm and timing during speed-bridging practicing. No movement is performed for you — it simply prevents accidental falls.

A lightweight, toggleable quality-of-life feature.

## Important Note

This mod is designed purely as a **practice tool** for improving your speed-bridging timing/singleplayer usage — **not** for gaining unfair advantages on multiplayer servers.  
Using it on servers may violate the [Minecraft Community Standards](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/community-standards) and most server rules.

By installing or using this mod, **you accept full responsibility** for any bans, kicks, or other consequences that may result from its use.

## Credits

The [1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/mod/sneaker/version/OnyzduVN) and the [26.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/sneaker/version/1.3.0) releases were created by [BattleDog249](https://github.com/BattleDog249).
